• Local Contrast Normalizationкіј мң мӮ¬
    What is the Best Multi-Stage Architecture for Object Recognition?

м•„вҖҰ feature mapмқҖ н•ӯмғҒ 1D мқёк°Җ?

  • non-trainable layer

  • AlexNet м—җм„ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•ң л°©мӢқмқҖ Inter-Channel LRN мқҙлӢӨ. AlexNet л§ҒнҒ¬ м°ёмЎ°н•ҳл©ҙ лҗЁ
  • Intra-Channel LRN:

    • the neighborhood is extended within the same channel only as it can be seen in the figure above. The foluma is given by

      • inter-channelмқҙ 1м°Ёмӣҗ (depth) л§Ң лӢӨлӨҳлӢӨл©ҙ, intra-channelмқҖ 2м°Ёмӣҗ (W,H) лҘј лӢӨлЈё \(->\) 2D neigborhood
